Home / Art Gallery / Textile Art
Collection 08

Textile Art

“Tradition becomes contemporary through imagination.”

The Textile Art of contemporary artist Nona Dronova combines traditional hand weaving with contemporary artistic expression. Many of the tapestries in this collection were woven on a historic loom dating from the early nineteenth century, originating from a village in the Novgorod region. This connection with traditional craftsmanship preserves the authenticity of historic weaving techniques while opening new possibilities for artistic experimentation.

The originality of Nona Dronova’s textile practice lies in combining these time-honoured weaving methods with innovative compositional ideas, including the integration of multiple woven panels into unified artistic works. Through this dialogue between heritage and contemporary design, tapestry becomes not only a traditional craft but a modern form of visual art, where texture, rhythm and colour create expressive compositions for contemporary interiors.
